name: Chase Freedom Unlimited®

welcome_offer.description: $250 cash back (25,000 points) after spending $500 in first 3 months

earning_rates.notes: 5% cash back on travel purchased through Chase Travel (3.5% bonus on top of 1.5% base)
3% cash back at restaurants including takeout and eligible delivery services (1.5% bonus on top of 1.5% base)
3% cash back at drugstores (1.5% bonus on top of 1.5% base)
1.5% cash back on all other purchases (unlimited flat rate)

other_benefits.name: Trip Cancellation/Interruption
other_benefits.description: Up to $1,500 per person and $6,000 per trip for trip cancellation/interruption when travel is booked with the card

other_benefits.name: DashPass
other_benefits.description: Complimentary 6 months of DashPass (then $12.99/month) — activated by 12/31/2027

notes: One of the best flat-rate no-AF cards. The 1.5% base + bonus categories in dining/drugstores/travel make it versatile. Can pair with Chase Sapphire Preferred/Reserve to boost Ultimate Rewards value (points transfer to travel partners at 1.5x/3x multiplier). Often combined with Freedom Flex for rotating categories.
